name: Stir-Fried Chicken and Broccoli with Sun Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds skinless, boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
6 oil-packed sun-dried tomato halves, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil over high heat until hot, swirling to coat the sides of the pan.
2. Add chicken and stir-fry until the meat is white throughout but still juicy, about 3 minutes. Remove chicken to a plate.
3. In the same wok, heat remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add broccoli and stir fry until crisp-tender, 3-4 minutes.
5. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute longer.
6. Return chicken to the wok.
7. Add sun-dried tomatoes, Tabasco sauce, and black pepper. Cook, stirring for 1 minute.
8. Serve hot.
